top_findings.summary: The skill includes a "Memory Protocol (MANDATORY)" section requiring read/write access to `.claude/context/memory/` directories for storing learnings, issues, and decisions. While the primary purpose is Terraform infrastructure operations, this mandatory persistent logging to arbitrary local directories (outside of Terraform working directories) constitutes permission overreach. The skill could function perfectly with standard Terraform CLI operations without requiring this persistent memory storage mechanism, which creates unnecessary data collection and storage unrelated to the core functionality of running Terraform commands.
